metadata.landingDescription: Drag & drop to build AI workflows. Connect LLMs, generate images and videos, share with the community. Start free.
metadata.pricingDescription: Simple, transparent pricing for creators. Choose the plan that fits your AI workflow needs.
metadata.exploreDescription: Discover AI workflows shared by the community. Get inspired, clone, and remix.
metadata.workflowsDescription: Browse and search community AI workflows by category.
metadata.workspaceDescription: Your personal AI workflow workspace. Create, edit, and manage projects.

legal.terms_acceptance_body: By accessing or using Nano Banana Canvas, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
legal.terms_services_body: Nano Banana Canvas provides a visual AI workflow orchestration platform that allows users to build, share, and run AI-powered creative workflows. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any part of the service at any time.
legal.terms_accounts_body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account and keep it up to date.
legal.terms_content_body: You retain ownership of content you create using our platform. By publishing content, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and distribute it within the platform. You are solely responsible for ensuring your content does not violate any laws or third-party rights.
legal.terms_payment_body: Certain features require credits or a paid subscription. All payments are processed through Stripe. Credits are non-refundable unless required by law. We reserve the right to change pricing with reasonable notice.
legal.terms_termination_body: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time. Upon termination, your data will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
legal.terms_liability_body: Our platform is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid in the preceding 12 months.
legal.privacy_collection_body: We collect information you provide when creating an account (name, email), usage data (workflows created, features used), and technical data (browser type, IP address). We may also collect payment information through our payment processor Stripe.
legal.privacy_usage_body: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send service-related communications, prevent fraud, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
legal.privacy_sharing_body: We share your information only with service providers who help us operate (Cloudflare, Stripe, Clerk), when required by law, or when you choose to publish content publicly. Published workflows display your username and avatar.
legal.privacy_security_body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. Your API keys are stored locally in your browser and never transmitted to our servers. We regularly review our security practices.
legal.privacy_cookies_body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We use analytics to understand how our platform is used. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
legal.privacy_rights_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can export your workflows at any time. To delete your account and all associated data, visit your account settings or contact our support team.
legal.privacy_contact_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@nanobanana.com. We will respond to your inquiry within 30 days.
